logs.message: Flowtap_Infrastructure depends on System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt (>= 8.3.2) but System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt 8.3.2 was not found. System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt 8.4.0 was resolved instead.
